title: Andrew Tridgell
text: Home * People * Andrew Tridgell Andrew Tridgell [1] Andrew Tridgell , an Australian programmer, primary author of the TD-learning chess program KnightCap [2] and best known as the major developer of the Samba software. His Ph.D. thesis Efficient Algorithms for Sorting and Synchronization [3] at the Australian National University was based on his work on the rsync algorithm.
